sentences.arabic: يَرْكَبُ إِبْرَاهِيمُ الدَّرَّاجَةَ لِلذِّهَابِ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translationEn: Ibrahim rides the bicycle to work.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ يُوَفِّرُ الْوَقْتَ وَيُفِيدُ الصِّحَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da to štedi vrijeme i koristi zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: He says that this saves time and benefits health.

sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ فِي عِشْرِينَ دَقِيقَةً بِالدَّرَّاجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stiže na posao za dvadeset minuta biciklom.
sentences.translationEn: He arrives at work in twenty minutes by bicycle.

sentences.arabic: أَصْدِقَاؤُهُ بَدَأُوا يَفْعَلُونَ نَفْسَ الشَّيْءِ بَعْدَ أَنْ رَأَوْهُ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji su počeli raditi isto nakon što su ga vidjeli.
sentences.translationEn: His friends started doing the same after they saw him.
